title: `feat:` add support for label filter with key only
body:
Fixes #26702 

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
`podman events` filter will behave the same as `podman container ls` filter
```

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
Oh and please add `Fixes: #26702` to your commit message if you repush.

@Luap99 I have tested my changes. Below are the results

Running BATS test:
```shell
$ PODMAN=./bin/podman bats test/system/090-events.bats -f "events with a filter by label"
090-events.bats
 ✓ [090] events with a filter by label and --no-trunc option

1 test, 0 failures
```

Testing with built podman binary:
```shell
$ ./bin/podman run -d --label testkey=testvalue --name testcontainer alpine sleep 10
Resolved "alpine" as an alias (/etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf)

$ ./bin/podman events --since=1m --filter label=testkey --stream=false
```

I'm really sorry for the force push, the DCO was failing so i had to ammend
@Luap99 I've put everything in a single commit with your suggested commit message format - https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26720/commits/0666b4ffbf3cf88031dadb2a0d1002a0235d26be
@Luap99 Gentle ping -- when you get a chance, please take a look and let me know for if you have any further suggestions. Thanks!
